why_this_action.summary: Used a fresh developer-facing AI tools directory with a live submit endpoint and an explicit AI Coding Tools category to place Ralph Workflow in front of coding-tool evaluators while keeping Codeberg as the primary destination.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains the primary success metric and is flat
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: current bottleneck is distribution and message to primary repo conversion
market_intelligence_latest.json: reusable positioning truths and comparison framing already exist
distribution_lane_latest.json: avoid duplicate curator/contact churn and prefer fresh executable demand-capture lanes
outreach-log.md: verified ToolNova had no prior submission or outreach entry

expected_outcome.goal: Earn a fresh ToolNova listing that can send qualified AI coding tool traffic to the primary Codeberg repo.
expected_outcome.success_metric: Live ToolNova listing or editorial follow-up plus eventual Codeberg traffic/adoption movement
expected_outcome.replacement_condition: If no listing evidence exists by 2026-06-07, treat ToolNova as non-converting and switch the next fresh run to a different demand-capture lane instead of another directory-family repeat.
